title: Ochna spruceana
taxonomy: Ochna spruceana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. It belongs to the genus Ochna, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical Africa. The family Ochnaceae is part of the order Malpighiales, which includes various families of flowering plants. Within the family Ochnaceae, Ochna spruceana is one of the many species that are commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants in the same family and order.
